name: Typed

unions.name: Typed
unions.comment:
A definition of `Typed` data.

Users can control data modifiability by giving permission to the type variable `p`.

aliases.name: Inunwrappable
aliases.comment: Inunwrappable permission prohibits users to call `value` function to get internal implementation.

aliases.name: ReadOnly
aliases.comment: ReadOnly permission prohibits users to call all functions that do constructing and updating such as `new`, `map` and `andThen`.

aliases.name: ReadWrite
aliases.comment: ReadWrite permission allows users to call all functions.
aliases.type: { read : Typed.Allowed, write : Typed.Allowed, unwrap : Typed.Allowed }

values.name: andThen
values.type: (a -> Typed.Typed tag b Typed.ReadWrite) -> Typed.Typed tag a Typed.ReadWrite -> Typed.Typed tag b Typed.ReadWrite

values.name: decode
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Typed.Typed tag a p)

values.name: decodeStrict
values.comment: Stricter version of `decode` that accepts a tag to check.
values.type: tag -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Typed.Typed tag a p)

values.name: encode
values.type: (a -> Json.Encode.Value) -> Typed.Typed tag a p -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: encodeStrict
values.comment: Stricter version of `encode` that accepts a tag to check.
values.type: tag -> (a -> Json.Encode.Value) -> Typed.Typed tag a p -> Json.Encode.Value

values.name: map
values.type: (a -> a) -> Typed.Typed tag a Typed.ReadWrite -> Typed.Typed tag a Typed.ReadWrite
